## User Need

Who needs this, and what concrete task are they trying to complete?

## Current Workaround

How do you handle this today?

## Proposed Behavior

What should cbw do differently?

## Scope

What should this change explicitly avoid doing?

## Validation

How could this be tested through a real user path or workflow run?
